_comment: dt-pilot MCP workspace configuration. This file is the SHAREABLE TEMPLATE — do not commit per-developer secrets here. Per-developer overrides belong in .vscode/mcp.session.json (gitignored), generated by scripts/New-McpSessionConfig.ps1 from the catalog at .vscode/mcp.servers.catalog.json.

inputs.description: Dynatrace platform URL (e.g. https://abc12345.apps.dynatrace.com). Tokens and OAuth secrets come from environment variables, never this file.
Context7 API key (optional; only prompted if context7 server is enabled).
